decisions.decision: Independent qa_reviewer accepted the Human Gate package as evidence-backed and process-only.
No product-owner approval is recorded; do not mark content locked and do not close M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 as CLOSED.
Set the active Human Gate to FORMAL_CONTENT_LOCK_ACCEPTANCE with product_owner as decision owner.
Lead recommendation for owner consideration is APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS as of origin/main 62e3c756199f50302ff3b0a5ee087da1fd0bffbe.

Carry M6 PASS_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE, Edge/Firefox tooling gaps, Windows DPI 150% follow-up, low-end Windows proxy limits, agent-operated manual playthrough limits, and all release/commercial/telemetry/server/cloud/mod/migration/culture Human Gates.

risks.summary: Autonomous continuation must pause at this Human Gate until the product owner explicitly decides.
Downstream records must not interpret QA package ACCEPT as M7 Gate PASS, release readiness, production art/culture approval, full platform coverage, or manual human acceptance.

requested_action: Product-owner Human Gate decision required. If approving, respond with APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS and accept the listed limitations; otherwise respond DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK or REQUEST_CHANGES with required changes.
